items.title: Boeing Stock Falls Below This Crucial Level As FAA Grounds MD-11 Jets
items.description: On Saturday, the FAA issued an order to ground all MD-11 planes while the crash is investigated. An MD-11 operated by United Parcel Service crashed last Wednesday.

items.title: KKR to Sell Novaria Group to Arcline for $2.2 Billion
items.description: The sale comes as private-equity firms are increasing investment in the aerospace and defense sector.

items.title: British Airways owner threatens to shift investment to Madrid amid Heathrow row
items.description: The chief executive of British Airways (BA) has warned that its Spanish owner could ditch investment in Heathrow if the bill for the airport’s third runway is too high.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Stocks closed higher on Monday, with the Nasdaq gaining more than 2% as investors eyed a potential end to the U.S. government shutdown.

items.title: Boeing Bets Big With $1 Billion Dreamliner Expansion
items.description: Expansion adds 1,000 jobs as jetmaker ramps up production
